metadata.description: Skills for token-efficient work with Claude on data engineering and architecture tasks. Orchestrates graphify, claude-mem, and caveman.

plugins.name: token-budget-discipline
plugins.description: Enforces token-budget discipline and smart model-tier routing (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) on long, complex, or codebase-heavy tasks. REQUIRES graphify, claude-mem, and caveman — fails closed if any are missing.
